texto: And so even the righteous heart is besieged by the blinding light of false knowledge. Falsity is like an ocean that presses around solitary moments of truth, treatening to overwhelm or blind the seekers of knowledge, to eradicate them in an instant of self-deceiving brilliance.Knowledge is power; it guards our souls - guard it well.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a C.S. Goto: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “And so even the righteous heart is besieged by the blinding light of false knowledge. Falsity is …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, knowledge, power pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de power.
